projectDescription: An AI-powered medical diagnostic assistant that predicts likely diagnoses from patient-reported symptoms using an XGBoost machine learning model, exposed via a FastAPI backend and a React/TypeScript frontend.
keyFeatures: Symptom-based diagnostic prediction using XGBoost classifier
TF-IDF text vectorization of free-text symptom descriptions
18 supported medical conditions in the training dataset
FastAPI REST backend with CORS support for flexible deployment
React + TypeScript frontend with dark mode and diagnosis history
Local diagnosis history with export-to-text functionality
Real-time API status indicator in the UI
Configurable allowed origins via environment variables
publicApiSurface: GET / — Welcome message and API health check
